name: DoctoLeb Billing And Insurance Process ERD

tables.name: doctors
tables.comments: Doctor/provider profile linked to a user.

tables.name: patients
tables.comments: Clinical patient profile linked to a user.

tables.name: visit_types
tables.comments: Visit type, duration, and billing defaults.

tables.name: appointments
tables.comments: Booked visit between patient and doctor.

tables.name: encounters
tables.comments: Clinical visit record opened from an appointment.

tables.name: payments
tables.comments: Payment record linked to patient, doctor, or visit.

tables.name: insurance_claims
tables.comments: Insurance claim raised from a clinical visit.

notes.content: Read: FK > owner. Areas group schemas. Lines should flow left to right.
appointment and encounter use policy, contract, and template to create payment or claim.
